index.title: vnnm
index.content:
Hi! My name is Sreeram Vennam, but I go by vnnm on the internet (vennam -> vxnnxm -> vnnm).
I mainly work in Machine Learning (愛) but I also enjoy low level programming and web-dev. I love watching anime, playing osu and sometimes rock climbing. If you’re an employer please check out my CV.
This blog attempts to explain hard/niche concepts in the world of computer science; hope you like it here :p
